title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing LLM and embeddings wrappers around Ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with async, streaming, and embeddings support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with readline & history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators & embedders.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C#/.NET SDK for Ollama with async streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers for CI pipelines and dev workflows.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing the Ollama binary and a selection of pre-packaged models.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example for scaling Ollama inference across GPUs/nodes.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial but feature-complete Go client for Ollama (streaming, embeddings, pull).

title: ollama-php
summary: Community PHP client with Laravel wrapper and Artisan commands for model management.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library plus CLI tool demonstrating FFI bindings to the Ollama REST API.
